a.tlua(5,7): error TLUA2339: Property 'tag' does not exist on type '{}'.
b.tlua(2,3): error TLUA2339: Property 'x' does not exist on type '{}'.
c.tlua(8,7): error TLUA2322: Type 'number | nil' is not assignable to type 'number'.
  Type 'nil' is not assignable to type 'number'.
d.tlua(2,12): error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'member'.
d.tlua(5,1): error TLUA2322: Type 'string' is not assignable to type 'number'.


==== a.tlua (1 errors) ====
    interface Shape {
      x: number;
    }
    Shape = {};
    Shape.tag = 1;
          ~~~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'tag' does not exist on type '{}'.
    local s: Shape = { x = 1 };
    
    // A non-constructor arm in any file closes an implicit global program-wide.
==== b.tlua (1 errors) ====
    G = {};
    G.x = 1;
      ~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'x' does not exist on type '{}'.
    
    U = {};
    
==== c.tlua (1 errors) ====
    local function make(): { y: number }
      return { y = 2 };
    end
    G = make();
    
    // A member written in only one arm's constructor needs narrowing: before the
    // assignment below narrows U, the read sees the whole union.
    local ua: number = U.a;
          ~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'number | nil' is not assignable to type 'number'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type 'nil' is not assignable to type 'number'.
    
    U = { a = 1 };
    local narrowed: number = U.a;
    
    // A dotted function colliding with a constructor field is a duplicate no
    // matter where it sits in the group; assignments to that field stay ordinary
    // checked writes.
==== d.tlua (2 errors) ====
    local t = { member = 1 };
    function t.member(): void
               ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'member'.
    end
    t.member = 2;
    t.member = "no";
    ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'string' is not assignable to type 'number'.
